message:
mcp_tools: import CompatRuntime / CompatRuntimeBuilder unconditionally, not just under cfg(test)

Follow-up to the prior mcp_tools import fix. The previous commit
put the import back under `#[cfg(test)]`, but the production path
inside `mcp_tools.rs` actually does use `CompatRuntimeBuilder`
(the synchronous scaffold for mission-control / rules-list runs on
the compat runtime when tokio is selected), so the `cfg(test)`
gate broke non-test builds.

Fix: drop the `#[cfg(test)]` attribute from the
`use crate::runtime_compat::{CompatRuntime, RuntimeBuilder as
CompatRuntimeBuilder};` line so both the production and test code
in this file resolve the same symbols. No other change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
